macro_goal: switch into the correct branch, ramp with ACTION4, then finish with an ACTION2 run to unlock the next correspondence level
level_hypotheses: level 4 begins with a control switch and short reposition before a long ACTION4 ramp
after the ramp, another switch plus repeated ACTION2 completes the level transition
ACTION4 is the dominant progress primitive on this level

entities.name: gray_shape
entities.notes: switch state gates whether ACTION4 or ACTION2 affects the intended branch

entities.name: yellow_shape
entities.notes: advanced by a long ACTION4 ramp before the finishing burst

entities.name: purple_shape
entities.notes: final correspondence anchor after the ramp

win_condition_hypotheses: switch-reposition-ramp-finish is the main level 4 solve pattern
repeated ACTION4 is the key mid-level progress primitive

constraints.description: ACTION5 must bracket the ACTION4 ramp and ACTION2 finish

anti_patterns: do not treat ACTION4 as a one-off probe; it needs a sustained burst
do not jump into ACTION2 finishing bursts before the ACTION4 ramp is established

subgoal_tests.description: confirm repeated ACTION4 creates the main ramp on level 4
subgoal_tests.verification: sustained ACTION4 moves the active branch through the ramp corridor

subgoal_tests.description: confirm ACTION2 is the best finishing burst after the ramp
subgoal_tests.verification: repeated ACTION2 closes the remaining gap after the ramp

subgoal_tests.description: use ACTION5 to enter the correct branch, ramp with repeated ACTION4, then switch and finish with repeated ACTION2 until the level advances
subgoal_tests.verification: level advances after the switch-ramp-finish composition
